raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$710.00} for lodging at XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, CA. The room was materially different from what was advertised and in unsanitary condition, including strong odors, stained and ripped bedding, and a dirty bathroom. These issues were discovered only after check-in. 
I filed a billing dispute with Citibank for services not as described. Citibank denied the dispute, stating I accepted the services with prior knowledge, which is inaccurate. I did not have advance knowledge of the conditions and stayed only because alternative lodging was unavailable due to a sold-out holiday period. Citibank closed the dispute and rebilled the charge without adequately addressing the defective service.
